name_en: Model: CJ853 Coach Field Tote 22. The body features a jacquard fabric and leather combination. A stunning colorway that is simple yet sophisticated. Square and cute. Handheld, shoulder, or crossbody. Versatile and practical. A super cute mini tote, a huge hit. ~A favorite for petite girls~

Dimensions: 22*21*12 cm
